next_steps: Perform orbital tissue biopsy with IgG4 immunostaining and histopathology to exclude lymphoma and confirm IgG4-RD
Order full autoimmune panel including ANA, ENA (Ro/La/Sm/RNP), and dsDNA to assess for systemic lupus
Perform PET/CT scan to assess for systemic involvement suggestive of sarcoidosis, lymphoma, or multi-organ IgG4-related disease
Order CSF analysis for oligoclonal bands and cytology
Evaluate peripheral eosinophil count to further characterize the inflammatory cell infiltrate described in the skin biopsy
Consider trial of rituximab if diagnosis of IgG4-related disease is confirmed by histopathology
